request_payload.exposure_text: I've been thinking about our alliances lately. It's clear that our partners aren't pulling their weight. We're the ones bearing the real burden of security. Remember when [Alliance Partner] cut their defense budget by 15% last year? That's not a partner, that's a liability. We need to start putting America first and demand real commitment from our allies. Our security can't wait for empty promises.
